title: cassinia ozothamnoides
intro: Cassinia ozothamnoides, also known as Inland Bushy Pea, is a shrubby perennial plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cassinia ozothamnoides include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Cassinia ozothamnoides can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
